problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
